rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type annexes for port assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation annexes for bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference port features and data types visible in that scope.
Implementation contracts should bind to subcomponent features and connections in valid implementation scope.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only declared variables or helpers within the same annex.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees must reference valid AADL features or declared helpers.
Constants and equations in AGREE should match the data types of AADL ports.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
